name: Magic Missile
description: You create three glowing darts of magical force that automatically hit their targets. Each dart deals 1d4+1 force damage. When cast at higher levels, one additional dart is created per slot level above 1st.

name: Burning Hands
description: As you hold your hands with thumbs touching and fingers spread, a thin sheet of flames shoots forth. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a DEX save. Failure: 3d6 fire damage; success: half. +1d6 per slot level above 1st.

name: Cure Wounds
description: A creature you touch regains 1d8 + your spellcasting modifier HP. +1d8 per slot level above 1st.

name: Thunderwave
description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps out in a 15-foot cube. Each creature must make a CON save. Failure: 2d8 thunder damage and pushed 10 ft; success: half. +1d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier of magical force appears and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 bonus to AC, including against the triggering attack.

name: Sleep
material: A pinch of fine sand, rose petals, or a cricket
description: This spell sends creatures into a magical slumber. Roll 5d8; the total is how many HP of creatures this spell can affect (lowest-HP creatures first). +2d8 per slot above 1st.

name: Hex
material: The petrified eye of a newt
description: You place a curse on a creature you can see. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage whenever you hit the cursed target. Duration extends at higher slot levels.

name: Guiding Bolt
description: A flash of light streaks toward a creature. On a hit, deals 4d6 radiant damage and the next attack roll against the creature before end of your next turn has advantage.
